channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-20134] sanityn test_12: FAIL: test_12 failed with 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Xiao Yang <xyang@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0c56526b-71b3-4bd0-b797-352c19f9ec24

test_12 failed with the following error:

test_12 failed with 1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/123874 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/123874 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

== sanityn test 12: test lock ordering (link, stat, unlink) ========================================================== 11:19:32 (1776165572)
warning: '-runtime' deprecated, use '-t runtime' instead

  • unlinked 0 (time 1776165624 ; total 0 ; last 0)
    unlink(/mnt/lustre2/lockdir/lockfile1326) error: No such file or directory
    total: 1325 unlinks in 37 seconds: 35.810810 unlinks/second
    rm: cannot remove '/mnt/lustre/lockdir': Directory not empty
    lockorder.sh: line 80: 250336 Terminated $CREATEMANY -l$LOCKFILE $LOCKFILE -$COUNT
    lockorder.sh: line 80: 250338 Terminated $STATMANY -s $DIR2/lockdir/lockfile 1 -$COUNT
    sanityn test_12: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_12 failed with 1
    Trace dump:
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7388:error()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7764:run_one()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7827:run_one_logged()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7642:run_test()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh:311:main()
    Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2026-04-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-5_123874_39_8802c903-8178-48dd-b8f7-ff38961122ec//sanityn.test_12.*.1776165675.log
    CMD: onyx-155vm53.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-155vm54,onyx-155vm56,onyx-155vm60,onyx-155vm61 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-04-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-5_123874_39_8802c903-8178-48dd-b8f7-ff38961122ec//sanityn.test_12.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1776165675.log;
    dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-04-14/lustre-reviews_review-dne-zfs-part-5_123874_39_8802c903-8178-48dd-b8f7-ff38961122ec//sanityn.test_12.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1776165675.log

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanityn test_12 - test_12 failed with 1
item.summary: sanityn test_12: FAIL: test_12 failed with 1

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Xiao Yang <xyang@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65308
Subject: LU-20134 tests: Wait for background processes in lockorder.sh
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 94fa9b591577066ee6d4e57a60dc7656661fcab4
